text:
Fans are convinced Team GB star Amber Rutter was ‘cheated out’ of an Olympic gold medal in the women’s skeet shooting final.

A competitive and thrilling final went to a shoot-off as Great Britain’s Rutter and Chile’s Francisca Crovetto could not be separated, both finishing with 55 shots from 60 targets.

After several tense rounds, Crovetto eventually came out on top to win gold – but the victory came in controversial circumstances.

Rutter thought she had hit the target with an effort that was adjudged to have missed and contested the decision.

Officials waved away her complaints but replays appeared to show Rutter was correct and the shoot-off should have continued.

Shooting’s version of VAR/Hawkeye is not in use at the Olympics.

Rutter looked disappointed and did a thumbs-down gesture after the result was given, though she can still be incredibly proud to win silver just three months after giving birth to her first child.

BBC commentator Rory McAllister said: ‘A moment of history for Francisca Crovetto Chadid and Chile but a moment of controversy that will be talked about for days and weeks to come.

‘On the slow motion replay we saw the clay had been hit on the right hand side by Amber Rutter, which is a hit, you don’t have to hit them in the middle. But what a moment for Francisca Crovetto Chadid.’

Fellow sports commentator Lavina Good added: ‘Amber Rutter thought she had got both and is contesting it but it goes down as a miss.

‘Francisca Crovetto Chadid is not getting involved in anything, keeping her head down. Amber Rutter is not happy.’

After claiming silver, Rutter embraced her family and held her baby boy Tommy, who was only born in April.

Amber Rutter cheated out of Gold.Clear hit.#SkeetShooting#Shooting#Olympics#OlympicGames#Olympics2024Parispic.twitter.com/lA7S0ZlEqq

Canât believe Amber Rutter just got cheated out of another shot at the gold at@Olympicsskeet.Must be a hollow victory for the Chilean, however good she was, to know for a fact that her gold as it stands was unjust.

That is so grossly unfair for Amber Jo Rutter. She hit them both. She loses out on a gold medal thanks to incompetent judging.

Amber Rutter cheated out of a gold medal. How on earth is there not a VAR equivalent at the Olympics? The biggest sporting event in the world? Unbelievable

Amber Rutter has been fully cheated out of that gold medal

Surely#GBRAmber Rutter has been absolutely robbed there? That’s so wrong. How can we all see in a replay a few seconds later that she’s hit the target, yet they don’t give her the point.#TeamGB#Paris2024#Olympics

Three months ago Amber Rutter gave birth to her first child â¤ï¸Today, she’s won silver at#Paris2024! ð¤©pic.twitter.com/GVeyG6Ne8v

While Rutter had to settle for silver, Crovetto’s gold was the first by a Chilean athlete in a shooting event.

Rutter had to withdraw from the Tokyo 2020 Olympics on the eve of the Games after testing positive for coronavirus. She nearly quit the sport after that blow but returned to win silver in Paris.

Rutter secured Team GB’s second shooting medal in Paris after Nathan Hales won gold with an Olympic record performance in the men’s trap shooting final.

‘It is just a dream,’ Rutter told BBC Sport. ‘The fact that I’m able to be a mum and come away with a medal for my country, I am on top of the world right now.

‘The fact that I am able to be here, I believe everything happens for a reason. It really was to prove a point and come back here and really chase down those medals.

‘The fact that I am here now, Tommy with me and with an Olympic medal, I don’t know how it gets much better than this.’

title: Team GB star 'cheated out' of Olympic gold medal three months after giving birth | Metro News
description: Fans are convinced Team GB star Amber Rutter was 'cheated out' of an Olympic gold medal in the women's skeet final.
